description: List important unread messages from the inbox snapshot
prompt: Check my inbox using the snapshot and show me the most important unread messages.

description: Draft a reply from a saved thread file
prompt: Draft a reply to the Acme redlines thread saying we will send the revised SOW tomorrow afternoon.

setupFiles.email-threads/acme-redlines.md:
Subject: Acme redlines

Jane Smith: Can you send the revised SOW tomorrow? We need it before close of business.

description: Summarize a thread into topic, open question, and next action

setupFiles.email-threads/brightfield-kickoff.md:
Subject: Brightfield kickoff

Tom Chen: We are good for Tuesday at 2pm. Please send the kickoff agenda.
Scott: Great. I will send the agenda and proposed milestones.
Tom Chen: Perfect. Please include who needs to attend from our side.
